# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

The site should only expose English and Spanish, with Spanish copy aligned to the current English content.

## Success Criteria

- Language switcher shows only English and Spanish.
- Spanish translations exist for the current visible UI.
- The app still compiles cleanly.

## UX Notes

- Keep the language choice simple.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- Some rarely used strings may remain in English if they are not part of the visible flow.
